global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with bold text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection with free shipping.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A vibrant orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: ZenDrop ALE
elements.description: Bold, large text at the top, prominently displaying the brand name 'ZenDrop ALE' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: New collection drop
elements.description: Medium-sized text below the headline, stating 'New collection drop' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Product placeholder
elements.description: A rectangular placeholder in the center, suggesting a product image or graphic.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative icon positioned at the top, possibly representing a feature or benefit.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Shop now', designed to attract clicks.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small price tag displaying '€9.99' in a clear font, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Free shipping badge
elements.description: A badge stating 'Free shipping over $25', positioned near the price to highlight a promotional offer.

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: The logo of ZenDrop, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Additional text
elements.description: Text at the bottom providing additional information about the collection drop.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A small text element encouraging users to take action, located at the bottom.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A small text element displaying the price, located at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by the body text, product placeholder in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
